title: Template option for item description
excerpt:
It would be awesome to be able to templatize an ‘item description’. 
My goal is this: I want an item description tab to be created every time I create a new item on a specific board. I want that item description to be fo…

posts.author: jessica-revboss (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be awesome to be able to templatize an ‘item description’.

My goal is this: I want an item description tab to be created every time I create a new item on a specific board. I want that item description to be formatted in a specific way as a template to be filled in.

This is what I am referring to for ‘item description’ – https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/17653444316562-The-Item-Description

posts.author: ggrudo (Gideon Grudo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Upvoted given similar needs and replying for emphasis.

Monday currently allows Docs templates to populate dynamic fields and the Item Description seems to operate by similar logic, so this request is, in a sense, to apply that same automation/template logic to the Item Description.

One use case would be creating a customizable summary of the item (in sentence case, for example, which would be incredible for translated summaries).

posts.author: poseidon2399 (Poseidonas Zacharogiannis)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really nice to have “item description” in “settings/default item values”

posts.author: LukeHGA (Luke Hanson)
posts.cookedHtml:
This functionality would be extremely useful. We are trying to standardise our approach to capturing the details or work items within our portfolio of projects.

Currently we are having to copy and paste a template from an external source, which is time consuming and open to error.

posts.author: cschoon (Clay)
posts.cookedHtml: Upvoted. I just want a simple text-based template that allows me to structure the layout of my stories/tickets.
